mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{postalCode}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
